posts.author: TechnoCactus (Rich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m looking for a way to change the value of a subitem status field after a certain amount of time has elapsed. The subitem owner can choose a set of status options, and I’d like a way to flip that field automatically to “Not Updated” after a certain period of time has passed.
